qa_pairs.question: What information is provided to a user after their CCDB account request has been approved?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a CCDB account request has been approved, the user will receive a notification email that includes their Role Identifier (CCRI).

qa_pairs.question: What is the primary responsibility of a Principal Investigator (PI) regarding Group Members after their own CCDB registration is complete?
qa_pairs.answer: After completing their own CCDB registration, a Principal Investigator (PI) must provide their CCRI to all Group Members they sponsor, and then confirm every individual Group Member who registers for a CCDB account using that CCRI.
